summary_en: 1,000,000 shares (0.57% of S/O), ¥1.4B upper limit, open-market purchase, Jun 1 – Aug 31, 2026. Rationale: strengthen shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice Regarding Resolution of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On 27 May 2026, PAL GROUP Holdings' board of directors resolved to acquire up to 1,000,000 of its own ordinary shares, representing 0.57% of issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange (Prime Market) between 1 June and 31 August 2026, with a maximum expenditure of ¥1.4 billion. The company stated the purpose as enhancing shareholder returns and improving capital efficiency while enabling flexible future capital allocation decisions. As of 28 February 2026, the company held 11,441,694 treasury shares against 173,646,306 issued shares outstanding.
